sub_modules.hpf_tap_vector: Combinational packing of the current input sample and stored delay-line samples into tap order.
sub_modules.hpf_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM containing the exact 101 signed high-pass FIR coefficients.
sub_modules.hpf_mac: Combinational fixed-point multiply-accumulate over all 101 taps using 64-bit accumulation.
sub_modules.hpf_quantize: Combinational fixed-point output scaling by arithmetic right shift to the 24-bit output width.
